content:
Let me know if you need guidance on revising this—I’m happy to help. Looking forward to your updated submissions!

Best,
Professor Padavano

⸻

Letter for Matheus Santana Olivieri

Dear Matheus,

Thanks for submitting your resume and cover letter. You’ve done a great job overall, and your materials show that you have a strong background in operations and construction management. Here’s my feedback on each.

Your cover letter is well-written and clearly conveys your interest in the position at Marquis Association Management. You’ve done a great job explaining your experience and how it relates to the role. However, one area that could be stronger is your explanation of why you’re drawn to this company specifically—right now, you mention the benefits but don’t expand on why this role aligns with your long-term goals. Strengthening that section would make your letter even more compelling.

Your resume is well-organized and presents your experience in a clear and professional manner. Your objective statement is strong, and your work experience is well-detailed. A couple of small refinements could make it even better—first, be sure that all bullet points follow the same tense for consistency. Second, double-check formatting to ensure spacing and indentation are uniform.
context: From document: Feedback Letters for Resume & Cover Letters — chunk 3 (chunk 3/22)
